Class ClusterInfo

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ClusterInfo
public class ClusterInfo extends Object
ClusterInfo gives access to cluster information such as cluster_state and cluster_slots_assigned provided by the CLUSTER INFO command.
Since:
1.7
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • getState

      public @Nullable String getState()
      Returns:
      null if no entry found for requested ClusterInfo.Info.STATE.

    • get

      public @Nullable String get(ClusterInfo.Info info)
      Parameters:
      info - must not be null
      Returns:
      null if no entry found for requested RedisClientInfo.INFO.

    • get

      public @Nullable String get(String key)
      Parameters:
      key - must not be null or empty.
      Returns:
      null if no entry found for requested key.
